description: The liquid waste a body produces and releases through the urinary tract is 'tomewu'. A speaker can describe its colour or amount, or report pain and frequency, in the next words. The ordinary noun carries no judgement about the person whose body produced it.
articulatory_notes: Place the tongue tip against the backs of the upper teeth for unvoiced dental 't' and release into middle-height back rounded 'o'. Close the lips for voiced 'm', carry the sound through the nose, and move into stressed middle-height front unrounded 'e'. Round the lips and raise the back of the tongue for voiced 'w', then finish with high-back rounded 'u'.

semantic_domains.physical: liquid bodily waste released through the urinary tract
